greatech.configuration.title: Greatech Configs
greatech.configuration.createBeltConnect: Create Belt Connector Break Stress Limit
greatech.configuration.converterCapacity: Internal EU buffer sizes ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.converterMaxOutpu: Maximum EU generated each tick ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.converterOutputVo: GTCEu output voltage ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.converterOutputAm: Maximum packets per tick ordered as [LV, MV, HV]. Voltage x amperage limits export throughput.
greatech.configuration.converterEfficien: EU generated per 1 RPM of Create rotation ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.converterStressIm: Stress impact added to the Create kinetic network ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.converterMinimumS: Minimum absolute RPM required before the machine starts generating EU.
greatech.configuration.createBeltConnect: Network stress above this value can break a Create belt connection in Greatech-monitored kinetic networks.
message.greatech.su_energy_converter.sta: Speed: %s rpm | Stored: %s EU | Generated: %s EU/t
